text:
(In reply to Gerald Pfeifer from comment #3)

I am a newbie, it may be something wrong with my system.
What exactly do you want me to do?
In your further requests - please specify what exactly you want me to do and how to do that.

pkg info | grep libGLU
libGLU-9.0.0_2                 OpenGL utility library

should I try to manually reinstall this port?
